episodes.title: Cold Contact
episodes.description: British operative Carr and French operative Beaumont are given the same target file — by different agencies.

episodes.title: Parallel Tracks
episodes.description: Each believes the other is a threat. They're both right, but not about what they think.

episodes.title: Brussels
episodes.description: A handoff goes wrong in Brussels. Someone in both agencies has been briefed about this meeting.

episodes.title: The Asset
episodes.description: The target turns out to be not a person but a piece of information — and it's moving.

episodes.title: Forced Alliance
episodes.description: Carr and Beaumont have 48 hours to cooperate before a third party takes them both out.

episodes.title: The Gibraltar Problem
episodes.description: A passage point that both of their agencies use is now compromised.

episodes.title: Running Dark
episodes.description: Both go off-comm for the final phase — which means no extraction if things go wrong.

episodes.title: The Run
episodes.description: A transatlantic boat crossing in deteriorating weather, with three parties in pursuit.

episodes.title: Secondment
episodes.description: Carr is formally assigned to work with French intelligence — Beaumont is not pleased.

episodes.title: The New Asset
episodes.description: A new target with connections to the first case resurfaces in Lisbon.

episodes.title: Mole Season
episodes.description: Evidence accumulates that one of their own services is actively leaking.

episodes.title: The Long Burn
episodes.description: A slow-build surveillance operation tests both operatives' patience and the partnership.

episodes.title: Beirut
episodes.description: An emergency extraction in Beirut forces them to improvise — and trust each other completely.

episodes.title: Accounts Settled
episodes.description: The mole is identified. The resolution requires one of them to walk away from their career.

extras.title: Location Breakdown
extras.description: How the production shot across eight countries in four months.

extras.title: The Stunt Design
extras.description: Stunt coordinator walkthrough of the finale boat sequence.
